title: OpenClinXR Agent Factory Design Spec
citation: OpenClinXR Agent Factory Design Spec committed in this repository on 2026-05-02.
permitted_uses: Operating source for the agent roster, maturity ladder, rubric, memory model, and review loop.
claims_supported: The Agent Factory should include Core, Adversarial, and Senior Leadership teams with persistent indexed memory.
The Agent Factory should measure improvement using a weighted rubric and senior approval gates.
claims_not_supported: External validation of OpenClinXR product feasibility.
